offlineConversions.title: Offline Conversions
offlineConversions.attributionOverlapNotice: Cross-platform totals may include overlapping attribution — platforms can independently claim the same conversion.
offlineConversions.dataQualityTooltip: Field completeness scores for your offline conversion uploads. Higher scores improve match rates and attribution accuracy.
offlineConversions.dataQualityDesc: Field completeness and data enrichment status
offlineConversions.summaryTooltip: Shows the health of your data pipelines (POS/CRM to ad platforms) and attributed offline conversion metrics per platform.
offlineConversions.summaryDesc: Data connections, conversion matching, and platform status
offlineConversions.engagementTooltip: Offline conversion metrics attributed by each ad platform (Google Ads, Meta CAPI, TikTok CAPI).
offlineConversions.weeklySalesTooltip: Compares online and offline sales revenue and transaction counts week-over-week. Includes ROAS tracking and ad spend overlay.
offlineConversions.dataPipelineTooltip: Shows the flow of offline conversion data from your sources (GCS, API, SFTP) through VenueX processing to ad platform destinations.
offlineConversions.activityLogDesc: Live status of conversion batch uploads
offlineConversions.activityLogTooltip: Real-time feed of conversion data uploads to Google, Meta, and TikTok. Click any completed event for a detailed batch report.

performanceMetrics.storeVisitsGoogleOnly: Store visit data available for Google only
performanceMetrics.kpiSummaryDesc: Key volume metrics across all channels
performanceMetrics.kpiSummaryTooltip: Aggregated spend, revenue, and conversion data across all filtered campaigns. Change percentages compare to the previous equivalent period.
performanceMetrics.omniFunnelDesc: End-to-end attribution flow from ad spend to conversions
performanceMetrics.omniFunnelTooltip: Shows how ad spend flows through impressions, clicks, and store visits to offline conversions. Platform-specific when a single platform is selected.
performanceMetrics.revenueTrendDesc: Weekly offline and online revenue by platform
performanceMetrics.revenueTrendTooltip: Stacked bars show revenue per ad platform, split by offline (solid) and online (light). The purple line tracks omnichannel ROAS over time.
performanceMetrics.platformComparisonTooltip: Compares ROAS, cost efficiency, and conversion rates across Google, Meta, and TikTok. Best Performer badges highlight the leading platform per metric.
performanceMetrics.campaignTypeDesc: Omnichannel ROAS by campaign objective type
performanceMetrics.campaignTypeTooltip: Shows which campaign types deliver the best omnichannel return. Bars are color-coded by ROAS performance tier.
performanceMetrics.topCampaignsDesc: Highest ROAS campaigns at a glance
performanceMetrics.topCampaignsTooltip: Top 5 campaigns ranked by omnichannel ROAS. Shows both offline-only and combined ROAS to highlight the omnichannel uplift per campaign.
performanceMetrics.weeklySalesTooltip: Compares online and offline sales revenue and transaction counts week-over-week. Includes ROAS tracking and ad spend overlay.
performanceMetrics.campaignTableDesc: Drill into campaigns, ad sets, and individual ads
performanceMetrics.campaignTableTooltip: Full campaign hierarchy with customizable columns. Click any campaign to see ad sets, then click an ad set to see ads. Use column groups to toggle metric visibility.
performanceMetrics.dataPipelineTooltip: Shows the flow of offline conversion data from your sources (GCS, API, SFTP) through VenueX processing to ad platform destinations.
performanceMetrics.activityLogDesc: Live status of conversion batch uploads
performanceMetrics.activityLogTooltip: Real-time feed of conversion data uploads to Google, Meta, and TikTok. Click any completed event for a detailed batch report.

dataConnectionTab.pipelineHealthTooltip: Real-time overview of your data pipeline status. Shows overall system health, processing volume, and match rate trends.
dataConnectionTab.pipelineHealthDesc: System status and key pipeline metrics
dataConnectionTab.ingestionSourcesTooltip: Your configured data sources for offline conversion events. Shows connection status, sync schedules, and recent sync history.
dataConnectionTab.ingestionSourcesDesc: Data source connections and sync status
dataConnectionTab.platformDestinationsTooltip: Ad platform endpoints receiving your offline conversion data. Shows upload status, match rates, and error counts.
dataConnectionTab.platformDestinationsDesc: Ad platform upload status and match rates
dataConnectionTab.uploadHistoryTooltip: Complete history of data batch uploads to ad platforms. Click any row to see the detailed batch report with error breakdowns.
dataConnectionTab.uploadHistoryDesc: Batch upload history and status tracking
dataConnectionTab.ingestionHistoryTooltip: History of data ingestion jobs from your configured sources into VenueX.
dataConnectionTab.ingestionHistoryDesc: Data ingestion job history and status
dataConnectionTab.noResultsDesc: Try changing the filter or search criteria
dataConnectionTab.activeIssuesTooltip: Current issues requiring attention. Each issue includes a suggested resolution action.
